name: CCELL - Fino Battery
summary: The CCELL Fino Cartridge Battery is a versatile and powerful battery designed for use with 510 thread cartridges.
description: The CCELL Fino Cartridge Battery is a versatile and powerful battery designed for use with 510 thread cartridges. It features a detachable power dock, allowing for convenient and easy charging. The battery boasts 8 voltage settings, providing users with customisable options to suit their vaping preferences. Additionally, the 10-second preheat function ensures a smooth and consistent vaping experience. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
